302.description: Redirects to Google OAuth2 login page

get.description: Since password login is disabled, this endpoint redirects to the Google OAuth2 login page.

302.description: Redirects to Google OAuth2 login page

400.description:
Possible reasons:
            - Missing 'code' or 'state' parameters in the request query.
            - Google profile is missing required 'given_name' (first name) or 'family_name' (last name).

401.description:
Possible reasons:
            - Invalid OAuth state (CSRF protection).
            - Failed to exchange authorization code for tokens.
            - Google did not return access or ID tokens.
            - Failed to fetch user profile from Google.

post.description: Development endpoint to quickly login as any registered user by email. Only available in non-production environments.

200.description: Successfully logged in as the specified user

401.description:
Possible reasons:
            - Dev login is not available in production environment.
            - User with the specified email does not exist.

post.summary: Dev/Test login - authenticate as any user
